placeholder.title: Section under construction
placeholder.subtitle: This page is not available yet

empty.title: No conversations to show
empty.body: Adjust the filters or date range to see results.

filters.only_failed_hint: Show only conversations with failed transcription

retranscribe.title: Re-transcribe conversation
retranscribe.subtitle: Destructive action
retranscribe.warn_headline: This action will replace the existing transcription.
retranscribe.warn_body: The current transcription and all derived analyses will be deleted and a new one will be generated.

multi.aria_seek: Seek position in the active leg

empty.no_recording_desc: Without audio we can't transcribe. Review recording rules if you expected this to be saved.
empty.no_transcription_desc: Generate the text to search within the conversation and enable analysis.
empty.transcription_empty_desc: Processing finished without extracting lines. This often happens with very short audios or long silences.
empty.ready_desc: Actionable summary and sentiment assessment over the existing transcription.
empty.deadend_desc: Analysis needs text. We launch transcription and, as soon as it finishes, we generate summary and sentiment.

processing.transcribing_caption: Processes the audio and separates speakers. Takes a few seconds.
processing.analyzing_caption: Generates summary and sentiment from the transcription.

analysis.no_summary: Not enough transcription to generate a summary.

download.title: Download conversation
download.subtitle: Select what to download
download.no_chats_hint: This conversation has no chat messages.
download.gdpr_hint: Deleted or empty conversations are not included in the download.

default.label: Mixed state
default.description: Realistic mix — the base set with recording, transcription and analysis in various states.

all-pending.label: All pending
all-pending.description: Calls with no transcription or analysis. Chats keep their transcription (always present by definition).

all-done.label: All processed
all-done.description: Everything recorded, transcribed and analyzed. Demos the C1 state (fully processed).

calls-only-untranscribed.label: Only pending calls
calls-only-untranscribed.description: Only calls with recording but no transcription. Ideal to showcase the main transcribe flow.

chats-only.label: Chats only
chats-only.description: Reduced to chats — all transcribed by definition. Demos that the analysis toggle starts on.

small.label: Small set
small.description: First 8 conversations for tighter views or captures.

multi-recording.label: Only multi-recording
multi-recording.description: Conversations that went through IVR with group transfer — each leg is a separate recording.

only-failed.label: Only failed
only-failed.description: Conversations with failed transcription. Demos the red terminal state + "Only failed" filter + "Mark as read" action.

gdpr-expired.label: GDPR retention expired
gdpr-expired.description: Conversations whose GDPR retention has expired — dimmed row, explanatory tooltip, silently excluded from bulk.

multi-tramo-parcial.label: Partial multi-leg
multi-tramo-parcial.description: Multi-recording calls where some legs are transcribed and others not — caveat documented in COA.

no-recording.label: Calls without recording
no-recording.description: Calls that came in but weren't recorded — "No recording" state in the player.

rules.empty_desc: Rules automate what gets recorded, transcribed and analyzed from conversations entering the system.
rules.no_active_hint: No active rules. Activate a rule to start applying it.

menu.activate_draft_tooltip: Edit at least one field to activate this rule.

conflict.title: In conflict
conflict.desc: This rule overlaps its scope with {{count}} rule(s) of the same type. The supervisor can coexist with conflicts — the UI shows which one wins.
conflict.hint: Drag to reorder and change priority.

rules.delete_body: You are about to delete «{{name}}». This action cannot be undone.
rules.duplicated_toast: Rule duplicated. Edit at least one field to activate it.

builder.subtitle: Define how to process conversations entering from now on. Applies to future, not existing ones.
builder.name_error: Name must be at least 3 characters.
builder.description_placeholder: Document the purpose of this rule for your team…
builder.scope_desc: Which conversations the rule applies to. An empty dimension means «any».
builder.recording_desc: Filter which calls in scope are recorded.
builder.transcription_desc: Filter which scoped conversations get transcribed. Transcription has a cost — use these filters to discard irrelevant conversations.
builder.duration_hint: Only conversations exceeding this duration get transcribed.
builder.attended_by_hint: Among scoped conversations, transcribe only those attended by…
builder.ai_analysis_desc: Generate summary and sentiment analysis of each transcribed conversation.
builder.categorias_hint: AI will only tag the categories you select. Leave empty to classify freely.
builder.categorias_empty: You don't have any AI categories yet. Create one in the repository to get started.
builder.draft_banner: This rule is an unmodified copy. Edit at least one field and save to activate it.

entities.user_desc: Custom data that AI extracts from conversation text.
entities.system_desc: Standard variables and entities included by default. Immutable.
entities.empty_user: You haven't created any entities yet. Create one so AI starts extracting it from the text.
entities.delete_body: You are about to delete entity «{{name}}». Rules referencing it will stop extracting it.

form.subtitle: Define a data point that AI should detect and extract from text.
form.name_error_duplicate: An entity with that name already exists.
form.description_placeholder: Document what this entity represents for your team…
form.type_locked_hint: Type cannot be changed in edit mode. Create a new one if you need another type.
form.list_values_hint: Define the discrete values AI should recognize.
form.list_values_empty: No values yet. Add at least one to save.

categories.empty_desc: Categories are the topics and contact reasons AI tags on conversations. Create one for the analysis to detect them automatically.
categories.delete_body: You are about to delete category «{{name}}». Rules referencing it will lose this tag.

form.subtitle: Define a topic or contact reason AI should detect in conversations.
form.name_error_duplicate: A category with that name already exists.
form.description_placeholder: Describe when this category should apply. Minimum 10 characters.
form.description_hint: AI uses this description to decide when to tag a conversation with this category. Be specific.
form.templates_hint: Pre-fill title and description with a typical case.

templates.title: Predefined templates
templates.subtitle: Choose a typical case to start with. You can adjust texts before saving.

linking.title: Rule linking
linking.tooltip: Categories are only detected in calls that match the conditions of the rules they're linked to.
linking.no_rules_desc: For AI to detect {{name}} in your calls, you need to link it to a rule. You don't have any rules yet.
linking.attach_desc: For AI to detect {{name}} in your calls, link it to a classification rule.
linking.bidirectional_tip: When you create a rule and link this category from the builder, it'll appear here automatically. Linking is bidirectional.

category_filter.label: AI Categories
category_filter.empty: No categories yet. Process conversations with analysis to see them here.

dispatch.all_failed: {{n}} transcriptions failed. Check 'Failed only' to retry.
dispatch.partial: {{ok}} processed · {{ko}} failed. Check 'Failed only' to retry.

form_nav.label: Form sections
form_nav.section_has_errors: This section has required fields unfilled

common.cross_tab_warning: This record is being edited in another tab. Changes may overwrite each other.

photo.invalid_type: Invalid format. Use JPG, PNG or GIF.

delete_dialog.body_single: You are about to delete {{entity}} «{{name}}». This action cannot be undone.
delete_dialog.body_bulk: This action cannot be undone. The following {{entity}} will be deleted:
delete_dialog.empty_pruned: You have discarded all items. Restore the list or cancel.

sidebar.design_decisions_hint: View DECISIONS.md on GitHub (opens in new tab)

empty.title: No labels yet
empty.text: Create your first label to organize and filter your agents

errors.duplicate_name: A label with this name already exists

empty.title: No templates yet
empty.text: Create your first message template to speed up service

errors.duplicate_title: A template with this title already exists

delete.single_detail: Agents and groups that have it assigned will lose the reference.
delete.bulk_footer: Agents and groups that have them assigned will lose the reference.

errors.duplicate_name: A {{entity}} with this name already exists

descriptions.agendas: Phone number collections for call routing
descriptions.horarios: Schedule slots and operating shifts for the contact center
descriptions.plantillas: Predefined messages for quick replies and campaigns
descriptions.labels: Color labels to organize and filter entities
descriptions.variables: Dynamic variables to personalize messages and flows
descriptions.entidades: Structured data the system extracts from conversations
descriptions.intenciones: User intents detected in natural language
descriptions.reglas_ia: Business rules applied to the AI engine
descriptions.entidades_ia: Semantic entities managed by language models

users.search_placeholder: Search user by name, email, identifier...

fields.name: Full name
fields.identifier_hint: If left empty it will be generated automatically on save.
fields.status_active: Active user: can log in and operate.
fields.status_inactive: Inactive user: cannot log in until reactivated.

form.danger_zone_description: Deleting this user revokes panel access and deletes their permissions. The action cannot be undone.
form.duplicate_hint: Duplicating «{{source}}» · fill in the required fields and save

empty.title: No users yet
empty.body: Create your first user to give panel access.
empty.body_filtered: Adjust the search or clear filters to see more results.

groups.search_placeholder: Search group by name, code, phone or strategy...

assigned.query_aria: Search assigned agent or add a new one
assigned.empty: Use the search above to assign the first agent to this group.
assigned.no_results: No assigned agents match the filter.

fields.name: Name
fields.typification_hint: Agent must categorize the conversation before closing it
fields.capacity_hint: Calls each agent can handle in parallel

cascade.title: You are about to remove channels
cascade.body: This will deactivate {{channels}} for {{count}} agents assigned to this group. Continue?

form.danger_zone_description: Deleting this group removes it from the rules and routes that reference it. The action cannot be undone.
form.duplicate_hint: Duplicating «{{source}}» · fill in the required fields and save

empty.title: No groups yet
empty.body: Create your first group to start routing interactions.

agents.search_placeholder: Search agent by name, code, extension or email...

section.recording_hint: Agent calls are recorded if enabled
section.languages_hint: Languages the agent speaks for routing
section.labels_hint: Categories that help filter and organize agents

comportamiento.title: Behavior
comportamiento.random_order_hint: Show agents in random order within the group

integracion.title: Integration
integracion.dispositivos_externos_hint: Allows the agent to connect from devices outside the corporate network

sesion.title: Session
sesion.login_ext_override_hint: If the agent logs in from another device, their extension updates automatically
sesion.expire_pwd_hint: Forces the agent to set a new password on their next login
sesion.expire_body: {{name}} will have to set a new password on their next login. The action cannot be undone.

fields.name: Name
fields.status_active: Active agent: can receive calls and chats.
fields.status_inactive: Inactive agent: does not receive new interactions.
fields.pin_hint: 3-6 digits. Used for self-activation from phone.

form.labels_empty: No labels yet. Create one from the Labels section.

assigned.empty: Use the search above to assign the first group to this agent.

permissions.manage_devices_hint: Agent can manage their assigned devices
permissions.self_activate_hint: Agent can activate or deactivate themselves in each group

form.danger_zone_description: Deleting this agent unassigns them from all groups they participate in. The action cannot be undone.
form.duplicate_hint: Duplicating «{{source}}» · fill in the required fields and save

errors.pin_invalid: PIN must have between 3 and 6 digits

empty.title: No agents yet
empty.body: Create your first agent to start receiving calls and conversations.
empty.body_filtered: Adjust the search or clear filters to see more results.

aed.title: Contact Center
aed.heading: Contact Center
aed.subtitle: Global parameters of the automatic distributor
aed.info: Select the prefixes of the countries allowed to be marked as special numbering. All prefixes are disabled by default.
aed.search_placeholder: Search country, prefix or ISO code...

estados.title: Agent states
estados.modal_subtitle: Add custom states that will be visible to agents alongside the default ones.

config.title: Configuration
config.activacion_label: Activation/Deactivation by Contact Center service group
config.gestion_label: Management of work devices in WebRTC

url.title: URL embedded in the agent workstation

params.title: Parameters
params.desbordar: Overflow conversations when no agents are available

seguridad.title: Security
seguridad.heading: Security
seguridad.subtitle: Security policies and platform credentials
seguridad.subtitle_empty: Section prepared for future security configurations

empty.title: No options for now
empty.body: Password policies and bulk regeneration have moved to System settings. This section is ready for future security-specific configurations.

policies.title: Password policies
policies.special_chars_hint: Requires at least one non-alphanumeric character

regen.title: Password regeneration
regen.warning_body: Regenerating passwords immediately invalidates current credentials of the selected agents. Each agent must use the temporary password provided in the download file to regain access and set a new password.
regen.use_case: Use this tool to recover access for agents who forgot their password, or in a security incident (cyberattack) requiring mass credential invalidation. You can select individual agents or use "Select all" for a global reset.
regen.search_placeholder: Search agent by name, code, extension or email...
regen.no_active_agents: No active agents in the system
regen.confirm_body: Type {{confirm}} to confirm action on {{count}} agents.

toast.regenerated_one: 1 password regenerated. Download the file with the temporary credential.
toast.regenerated_many: {{count}} passwords regenerated. Download the file with the temporary credentials.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.theme_hint: Choose how the interface is shown. The System option follows your operating system preference.

language.title: Language
language.label: Interface language
language.lang_hint: Choose the language in which the interface is shown. The change applies immediately.

data.title: Data
data.reset_hint: Deletes the changes you made to agents, groups, users, labels, templates and repositories, and returns the application to its initial state. Theme and column preferences are kept.
data.confirm_body: This action will delete all changes you made to agents, groups, users, labels, templates and repositories. The page will reload.
